overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character traverses covered walkways under elevated highways, crosses a busy intersection with NCPD presence, and continues along a sidewalk lined with large digital billboards and neon signs. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with towering buildings, holographic advertisements, and a mix of sunlight and shadow.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of the character in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass casting shadows on the street below
red and yellow food vending machine with illuminated signage
teal neon sign for security services mounted on building facade
large cylindrical pillars supporting the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure. The area is semi-covered with mixed lighting from sunlight filtering through gaps. A Burrito XXL vending machine stands out on the right, while large concrete support pillars line the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with police presence

events.description: exits covered walkway into open sunlit intersection
crossing the multi-lane road using yellow zebra crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with other pedestrians while vehicles wait at the traffic signal

notable_agents.action: silver car driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: blue and white police booth with NCPD signage
massive screen displaying colorful holographic advertisements
yellow painted crosswalk lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a bright, open intersection. The NCPD police structure is visible on the left while large digital billboards display advertisements on the right. The character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians as vehicles move through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along arterial road with digital billboard wall

events.description: turns onto sidewalk alongside multi-lane road with wall of digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a busy road, passing purple vending machines and neon signs

metal railing separating sidewalk from the multi-lane road
pair of illuminated purple vending machines on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a sidewalk running alongside a busy multi-lane road. An orange safety railing separates the walkway from the traffic. On the left, massive digital billboards display advertisements including 'Watson Whore' and 'Fuyutsuki' while purple vending machines line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: passing large circular neon sign for Shinonome Chronos

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past various storefronts and neon signs, approaching a building with a teal entrance

notable_agents.action: person sitting against the building wall on the right side

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with 'Shinonome Chronos' text in teal and pink
building facade with distinctive teal-colored entranceway
tall building with red and orange paneling

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the arterial sidewalk, passing a building with a distinctive teal entrance and a large circular neon sign for 'Shinonome Chronos.' The elevated highway structure remains overhead while various digital billboards and storefronts line the route. A pedestrian sits against the building wall on the right as the character walks past.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed urban underpass into a vibrant, neon-lit city thoroughfare. It begins with the character walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway, passing a Burrito XXL vending machine and heavy support pillars in filtered sunlight. As the character emerges from the cover, the scene opens into a bright intersection where they cross a yellow-striped crosswalk past an NCPD structure and towering digital billboards. The camera then shifts to follow the character along a busy multi-lane road separated by an orange safety railing, moving past purple vending machines and advertisements for Watson Whore and Fuyutsuki. Finally, the path leads past a teal building entrance and a circular neon sign for Shinonome Chronos, continuing under the overhead highway as the character passes a pedestrian resting against a wall.
